playbook.intent: Cross-quarter migration completes with zero data loss, rollback path proven, dual-stack period bounded, all squads informed. Output: pre-migration baseline, dual-write/shadow-read evidence, cutover runbook executed, post-migration audit clean.
playbook.scope: Cross-quarter migration completes with zero data loss, rollback path proven, dual-stack period bounded, all squads informed. Output: pre-migration baseline, dual-write/shadow-read evidence, cutover runbook executed, post-migration audit clean.

success-criteria.criterion: All 6 stages have written outputs in the project record
Each stage's decision gate was answered before advancing (yes / no in writing)
Final stage produced the required written decision artifact
Every methodology reference loaded cleanly via `faion get-content`

stage.name: Scope the Migration
stage.intent: What exactly is moving, and why.

tasks.task: Define source-state, target-state, and the business reason
Quantify risk: downtime, data loss, perf regression, dev velocity

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when scope and rollback are signed off by tech lead + PM.

stage.name: Design the Cutover
stage.intent: Pick a migration shape: dual-write, big-bang, strangler.

tasks.task: Pick the migration pattern with explicit tradeoffs
Design data-migration scripts and verification queries
Design dashboards to watch the cutover live

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the RFC is approved with no blocking comments.

stage.name: Dry-Run in Staging
stage.intent: Do the migration where it doesn't hurt.

tasks.task: Run the full migration against a prod-snapshot in staging
Verify data parity with the verification queries
Time the migration; resolve any step that took >2x estimate

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when staging migration runs clean and within budget.

stage.name: Communicate & Schedule
stage.intent: No surprises for users or on-call.

tasks.task: Pick the maintenance window; tell affected users in writing
Brief on-call and stakeholders on the runbook
Stage the rollback path on standby

stage.decision-gate: Advance when comms have gone out at least 48h before window.

stage.name: Cut Over

tasks.task: Run the migration runbook step by step
Verify parity post-cutover; gate users back in by cohort
Hold position at the rollback decision point until parity is green

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when post-cutover parity is signed off.

stage.name: Stabilize & Retro

tasks.task: Watch dashboards for 1 week; fix regressions promptly
Run a blameless retro on the migration
Decide: tear down old system or run dual until milestone

stage.decision-gate: Required output: a written decommission or dual-run decision.
